subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the grandeur and the sovereignty, the power and the dominion. He giveth and withholdeth, and He is sanctified above all mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له العظمه و الاقتدار و القدرة و الاختیار یعطی و یمنع و هو المقدس عن ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
